Gear Aid Aquaseal SR Shoe Repair and 4oz Rubber Boot Cleaner Bundle, 2 Piece Set

Revivex Rubber Boot Treatment is a conditioner that restores shine and provides protection for rubber boots. Sun damage and drying can ruin rubber boots, but this formula acts as a moisturizer to restore shine and protect from UV rays and grime

Key Features

  • 2PC BOOT CARE BUNDLE - Fight UV damage and protect against sunlight exposure with a rubber boot treatment that’s also a neoprene protector
  • 4 OZ BOOT TREATMENT - Condition rubber and muck boots by restoring shine to outdoor gear with just a 4 fl oz bottle; also stops discoloration without harsh solvents
  • 1 OZ ADHESIVE SEALANT - Prevent cracking and blooming on rubber, neoprene, vinyl and even plastic to restore the appearance of all kinds of boots Fix holes, create toe protector, rebuild worn heels with Aquaseal Shoe Repair Adhesive
  • TEMPERATURE RESISTANT - Unaffected by heat or cold, make heavy duty durable shoe repairs that can withstand the elements whether at a jobsite or on a mountaintop

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GABCBUN2PC
